title: Creamy Beef and Arborio Rice Casserole
description: A comforting casserole made with ground beef, creamy sauce, and arborio rice. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook the arborio rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the smoky seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cheesy mixture and cook until melted.
Add the cooked arborio rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the rice mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the creamy sauce and zesty mixture.
Pour the creamy sauce mixture over the rice mixture in the baking dish.
Top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
